column1: # Methodology: en_50k word counts merged with enwiki title-token counts (each unique
#   word per title contributes count=1). All entries pass en_ok: must be /usr/share/dict
#   lowercase entry, not in EN_BLOCK / EN_NAME_BLOCK. ~85k unique lemmas after filter.
#   Wiki contribution mostly populates rank 30k+ with domain-specific rare vocabulary
# Curated probe subset for /vocab level test (vocabulary size estimation, testyourvocab-style).
